name: Axonius
description: Cyber asset attack surface management platform aggregating data from multiple sources to provide comprehensive asset inventory, security gap identification, and policy enforcement

actions.name: List Device Assets
actions.description: Retrieve device assets from the aggregated inventory with optional filtering

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Specific fields to include in the response

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pagination configuration with limit and offset

actions.name: List User Assets
actions.description: Retrieve user assets from the aggregated inventory

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: AQL filter expression for user search

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Specific fields to include in the response

actions.name: Get Device Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific device asset by internal ID

parameters.name: internal_axon_id
parameters.description: The internal Axonius ID of the device

actions.name: List Saved Queries
actions.description: Retrieve saved queries for devices and users

parameters.name: asset_type
parameters.description: Asset type for saved queries (devices, users)

actions.name: Run Saved Query
actions.description: Execute a saved query and retrieve matching assets

parameters.name: query_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the saved query

actions.name: Count Devices
actions.description: Get the total count of device assets matching a query

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: AQL filter expression for counting devices

actions.name: List Tags
actions.description: Retrieve all tags used for categorizing assets

actions.name: Add Tag to Assets
actions.description: Apply a tag to one or more assets for categorization

parameters.name: tag_name
parameters.description: Name of the tag to apply

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: List of asset IDs to tag
